title: Who’s Your Favourite Squash Player?
excerpt: The PSA has been running a “best player of all time” poll, and it made us wonder: who is your favourite squash player. We’ve picked out a few male and female squash players, some of whom have visited Edmonton recently. Let us know who your favourites are.
content: The PSA has been running a “best player of all time” poll, and it made us wonder: who is your favourite squash player. We’ve picked out a few male and female squash players, some of whom have visited Edmonton recently. Let us know who your favourites are.
